name: filter_skip_entire_seq_is_empty
reason: If no element satisfies the predicate, the filter result is empty — this is expected behavior, not a spec gap

name: skip_zero_is_identity
reason: Calling with i=0 trivially holds (vacuous quantifier) and gives a tautology — the lemma's precondition is vacuously satisfiable, potentially masking misuse where the caller believes elements were actually checked

name: filter_skip_rejected_drop_last_equiv
reason: Skipping a single rejected element and filtering the rest equals filtering the whole — this is correct but could be chained inductively to strip arbitrary prefixes without rechecking the predicate on removed elements

name: filter_empty_skip_any
reason: The lemma accepts empty sequences with i=0 and produces a trivial equality — empty-sequence edge case is handled but reveals no filtering work was done

name: skip_at_len_filter_equals_empty_filter
reason: When all elements are rejected, filtering the sequence equals filtering an empty sequence — this conflates "all rejected" with "no data", which could hide logic errors in callers that distinguish between empty input and fully-filtered input
